ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure login */,
  "account_balance" REAL /* Current balance in the user's betting account */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered on the platform */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's address */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* User's date of birth */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path of the user's profile picture */,
  "verification_status" TEXT /* Verification status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game (e.g., Roulette, Blackjack) */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., Casino, Sports) */,
  "min_bet" REAL /* Minimum bet allowed for the game */,
  "max_bet" REAL /* Maximum bet allowed for the game */,
  "game_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the game */,
  "game_rules" TEXT /* Rules of the game */,
  "game_image" TEXT /* URL or path of the game image */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., Active, Maintenance) */,
  "game_category" TEXT /* Category of the game (e.g., Sports, Casino) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bets" (
  "bet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the bet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the bet */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the bet was placed on */,
  "stake_amount" REAL /* Amount of money staked on the bet */,
  "bet_result" TEXT /* Result of the bet (e.g., Win, Lose, Draw) */,
  "bet_date" TEXT /* Date the bet was placed */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the betting market the bet was placed on */,
  "bet_status" TEXT /* Status of the bet (e.g., Open, Settled, Canceled) */,
  "bet_amount" REAL /* Amount of money staked on the bet (redundant for consistency) */,
  "payout" REAL /* Payout amount if the bet wins */,
  "bet_source" TEXT /* Source of the bet (e.g., Web, Mobile App) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bets_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bets_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES betting_markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the result entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game associated with the result */,
  "result" TEXT /* Outcome of the game (e.g., 'Red', 'Black') */,
  "payout_multiplier" REAL /* Multiplier for the payout based on the result */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date when the result was recorded */,
  "result_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the result */,
  "result_image" TEXT /* URL or path of the result image */,
  "result_status" TEXT /* Status of the result (e.g., Confirmed, Pending, Disputed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., Deposit, Withdrawal) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of money involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., Completed, Pending, Failed) */,
  "transaction_method" TEXT /* Method of transaction (e.g., Credit Card, Bank Transfer) */,
  "transaction_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the transaction */,
  "transaction_source" TEXT /* Source of the transaction (e.g., Web, Mobile App) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "betting_markets" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the betting market */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game associated with the market */,
  "market_name" TEXT /* Name of the betting market (e.g., 'First to Score') */,
  "odds" REAL /* Odds offered for the betting market */,
  "market_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the betting market */,
  "market_rules" TEXT /* Rules of the betting market */,
  "market_status" TEXT /* Status of the market (e.g., Active, Suspended, Closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_betting_markets_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., User, Admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "role_privileges" TEXT /* Specific privileges associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to a role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was assigned */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the role assignment expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "odds_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the odds update */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market whose odds are updated */,
  "new_odds" REAL /* New odds value after the update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the odds were updated */,
  "update_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the odds update */,
  "update_source" TEXT /* Source of the odds update (e.g., Manual, Automated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_odds_updates_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES betting_markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "support_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the support request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the request */,
  "request_text" TEXT /* Text of the support request */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the request (e.g., Pending, Resolved) */,
  "request_type" TEXT /* Type of support request (e.g., Technical, Financial) */,
  "response_text" TEXT /* Response to the support request */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date when the response was sent */,
  "assigned_to" TEXT /* Customer support representative assigned to the request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_support_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
